_comment: Single source of truth for Plan Forge statistics cited across the docs. Update this first, then run scripts/check-metrics.ps1 (or .sh) to find any surface that still shows stale numbers. DO NOT template-inject this file into HTML — the goal is detection, not generation. Bump values here whenever a release changes them.
dashboardTabsBreakdown: Forge: Home, Runs, Progress, Crucible, Governance, Cost, Actions, Replay, Extensions, Config, Traces, Skills, Watcher, Tempering, Bug Registry, Memory, Timeline, Review (18) + LiveGuard: Health, Incidents, Triage, Security, Env (5) + others (2)

_knownStaleAliases._comment: Numbers that appeared in prior versions and should NEVER appear in current docs. The checker flags any of these found outside of CHANGELOG.md or /memories/.
